changelog.title: This Week's Focus
changelog.desc: A no-pressure weekly checklist now lives on your dashboard, right under the Creative Director. Pick 1-3 things to move forward this week. Checkboxes only, no dates, no pressure.

changelog.title: Task Card Design Updated
changelog.desc: Task cards in the Task Board now use the tan background with a teal bottom strip, and titles match the clean readable font from Saved Drafts.

changelog.title: Content Card Titles More Readable
changelog.desc: Card titles in the Content Planner now use the same clean font and weight as your Saved Drafts cards.

changelog.title: Calendar Ghost Entries Fixed
changelog.desc: Deleted content cards and tasks now fully disappear from the calendar immediately. No more black ghost entries.

changelog.title: Dashboard Tasks Load on First Visit
changelog.desc: On Your Plate now shows today and tomorrow tasks immediately when you open the app, without needing to navigate away and back.

changelog.title: AI Instruction Field
changelog.desc: Before generating in the Writing Studio or any content card, you can now give the AI a specific instruction. Keep my voice, punch up the hook, make it shorter, whatever you need.

changelog.title: Tags and Links Save with Drafts
changelog.desc: Tags and links you add in the Writing Studio now save with your draft automatically.
